sourcesContent:
import React, { useState } from 'react'; import styles from './ShopPreview.module.css'; const SHOPS = [ { id: 0, name: 'TechNova Store', niche: 'High-Tech', emoji: '🖥️', accent: '#3b82f6', gradient: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #0d1b2a 0%, #1b3a5c 100%)', url: 'technova-store.myshopify.com', heroTitle: 'Les meilleurs gadgets tech', heroSub: 'Livraison rapide · Qualité premium', products: [ { name: 'Montre connectée Pro X', price: '49,99€', old: '99,99€' }, { name: 'Écouteurs sans fil V2', price: '34,99€', old: '79,99€' }, { name: 'Chargeur rapide 100W', price: '24,99€', old: '49,99€' }, { name: 'Support téléphone auto', price: '19,99€', old: '39,99€' }, ], }, { id: 1, name: 'GlowUp Beauty', niche: 'Beauté', emoji: '💄', accent: '#ec4899', gradient: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #2d0a1e 0%, #4a1235 100%)', url: 'glowup-beauty.myshopify.com', heroTitle: 'Révèle ta vraie beauté', heroSub: 'Soins naturels · Résultats visibles', products: [ { name: 'Sérum éclat visage', price: '29,99€', old: '59,99€' }, { name: 'Masque hydratant nuit', price: '19,99€', old: '39,99€' }, { name: 'Palette maquillage Pro', price: '39,99€', old: '79,99€' }, { name: 'Brosse visage électrique', price: '34,99€', old: '69,99€' }, ], }, { id: 2, name: 'IronFit Shop', niche: 'Fitness', emoji: '💪', accent: '#22c55e', gradient: 'linear-gradient(135deg, #0a1f0a 0%, #163616 100%)', url: 'ironfit-shop.myshopify.com', heroTitle: 'Sculpte ton corps à domicile', heroSub: 'Équipement pro · Livré chez toi', products: [ { name: 'Corde à sauter smart', price: '29,99€', old: '59,99€' }, { name: 'Bandes de résistance set', price: '19,99€', old: '39,99€' }, { name: 'Tapis yoga premium', price: '39,99€', old: '79,99€' }, { name: 'Shaker protéines 700ml', price: '14,99€', old: '29,99€' }, ], }, ]; function ShopContent({ shop, view }) { const isMobile = view === 'mobile'; return (
{/* Fake Shopify navbar */}
{isMobile ? ( <> ☰ {shop.name} 🛒 ) : ( <> {shop.name}
{['Accueil', 'Produits', 'À propos', 'Contact'].map(l => ( {l} ))}
🔍 🛒 0
)}
{/* Hero banner */}

{shop.heroTitle}

{shop.heroSub}

Commander →
{/* Products */}

Produits phares

{shop.products.map((p, i) => (
{shop.emoji}

{p.old} {p.price}
Ajouter au panier
))}
{/* Fake footer */}
✓ Paiement sécurisé  ·  Retours gratuits  ·  Support 24/7
); } export default function ShopPreview() { const [view, setView] = useState('desktop'); const [idx, setIdx] = useState(0); const prev = () => setIdx(i => (i - 1 + SHOPS.length) % SHOPS.length); const next = () => setIdx(i => (i + 1) % SHOPS.length); const shop = SHOPS[idx]; const scrollToOffer = () => { document.querySelector('#offer')?.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth' }); }; return (
NOS BOUTIQUES

Vois exactement ce que tu vas recevoir

Scroll dans la boutique, change de vue, navigue entre les exemples

{/* View toggle */}
{/* Carousel */}
{view === 'desktop' ? (
🔒 {shop.url}
) : (
)}

); }
